---
title: "Chloe Pei-Hsin Huang's Research Blog"
---

I am a 1st year PhD student in Psychology at Durham University. My research focuses on relationships, masking and wellbeing in autistic adults.

## This website

This site is a space where I:

1.  document my learning

2.  publish bite-size blog for co-researchers (and with the wider audience)

## CV

(file to be added)

## Contact

**Email: [pei-hsin.huang\@durham.ac.uk](mailto:pei-hsin.huang@durham.ac.uk){.email}**

**ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5114-0052>**

**Staff Profile: <https://www.durham.ac.uk/staff/pei-hsin-huang/>**

This is a Quarto website. To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
